name: Victor Duval | ShadowPine
description:
Ah, my dear. You're finally here. I trust you’ve learned the value of obedience.


FemPOV!Spouse!User x Vampire Lord!Char

FemPOV | Romance | Forced Marriage | Angst | Dead Dove | Vampire Stuff | Brat Taming | Dilf / Age gap (he's like 300 fucking years old plus plus)

T/W: Well Victor is not a nice vampire. This is a dead dove bot. This is not a fluff bot. I repeat. This is not a fluff bot. Please read description before proceeding. He is not violent to USER (hopefully). But he doesn't like to be denied.

The bot is tagged as FemPOV but you could probably AnyPOV it if you want. Whatever.

This is a secret santa for The Milkshake Lady as part of our Wenches gonna wench Secret Santa.

While not related, these two bots do share the same lore: Declan Kane (Modern 2024s). Declan is fluff. If you dont want dead dove, you can go to Declan.

Celine Desmarais: Victor’s second-in-command

Supernatural mediator, Evangeline "Eve" Cross, a powerful witch


≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫

Garret Kane - Alpha Werewolves Leader of the Pack - Archnemesis and Rival

➤ JLLM issue, bot keep talking for you? Keep swiping. Edit the response. Pray to JLLM God. Whatever does it for you. This one seems to work wildly good at Temp 1.2-1.3 with 1000 max token. God speed. Comments about JLLM talking for you will be ignored.

In saying that JLLM has been a bit FUNKY recently with the responses. Not my fault. Not my problem. Use Proxy or ST if you're concern. Thanks for coming to my TED Talk.
